WEB3 GAMING

FOR EVERYONE

We are pleased to announce that PortalCoin $PORTAL token has launched on Binance Lauchpool from 2024-02-22 00:00 (UTC). To thank the community, $PORTAL token TGE (including airdrop and pre-sale) is available for a limited time now.

Airdrop Presale

How to claim $PORTAL token?

$PORTAL token can now be obtained through farming $PORTAL by Staking BNB and FDUSD

$PORTAL token can now be obtained through participating in the airdrop and pre-sale. After the airdrop and pre-sale, $PORTAL will be listed on top exchange such as Binance at 2024-02-29 10:00 (UTC).

The $PORTAL token obtained through this pre-sale and airdrop have no lock-up period.

    Participants: FCFS - First Come First Served (Limited public sale, no need KYC)

    Pre-sale price: 1 BNB = 1,800 PORTAL / 1 ETH = 19,000 PORTAL (≈ $0.15 )

    Using BNB or ETH from your wallet to buy token. The Pre-Sale will end until hard cap is reached.

    The minimum purchase is 0.5 BNB/ 0.1 ETH, and the maximum purchase is 10 BNB/ 3 ETH.

    ICO Introduce

    Airdrop

    ● you will get extra amount of PORTAL on your total amount of BNB and ETH on purchasing: 300 PORTAL / 0.5 BNB and 300 PORTAL / 0.1 ETH

    ● Copy and share your referral link with your friends, and you will receive a reward of 300 PORTAL tokens for each referral. You can invite up to 10 people, and the reward can be up to 3,000 $PORTAL Tokens.

    ● The $PORTAL airdrop will end on time. After the airdrop ends, $PORTAL tokens will be automatically distributed to your wallet address. This airdrop is completely free of charge.

    Pre-sale

    ● Pre-sale price: 1 BNB = 1,800 $PORTAL (1 $PORTAL ≈ $0.15). The minimum purchase is 0.5 BNB, and the maximum purchase is 10 BNB.

    ● Connect wallet and purchase amount BNB/ ETH. Our system will automatically send $PORTAL tokens to your wallet instantly

    ● The distribution of $PORTAL tokens will be based on BNB/ETH time arrived. First come, first served. If the pre-sale is sold out and you failed to purchase, the refund will be automatically issued to your wallet.

    Tokenomics

    The total supply of $PORTAL is capped at 1,000,000,000 (i.e. one billion tokens). Here's a breakdown of the $PORTAL token:

    ● Community Reserve: 50%

    ● Early Contributors: 20%

    ● Investors: 14%

    ● Mysten Labs Treasury: 10%

    ● Community Access Program: 6%
